title: Virus
description: The Virus plugin from ZDev adds a system of random viruses to the game that can infect players with different effects.!
body:
**Virus is a unique plugin that adds a system of viral diseases to Minecraft, making the gameplay more interesting and intense. The plugin creates a dynamic infection system where players must be careful and help each other.**

**Main features**

Virus system

5 unique viruses with different effects:

_Plague (weakness and disorientation)

COVID-19 (slowdown and weakness)

Flu (slowing down and disorienting)

Smallpox (weakness and poisoning)

Fever (slowness of digging and weakness)_

**The phase system**

Automatic alternation of infection and security phases
Configurable time for each phase

Accidental infection of players at the beginning of the infection phase
Game mechanics

Infection caused by close contact with an infected player

The possibility of being cured with milk

Visual indicators of infection status (BossBar)

Healthy Status Notifications (ActionBar)

**Multilingual**

Built-in multi-language support

The command to change the language

Easy addition of new languages

**Customization**

Flexible configuration via config.yml

Setting the phase time

Configuring the infection radius

Setting the color of the indicators

Setting up infection intervals

**Commands**

/virus info - information about the current infection status

/virus lang - language change

/virus reload - configuration reboot (requires permission)


**Technical features**

Optimized code

Low resource consumption

Compatible with Paper/Spigot

Support for the latest versions of Minecraft

**Why should I install it?**

Adds a new level of difficulty to the game

Creates interesting social interactions between players

Unique gameplay that is not found in other plug-ins

Fully customizable to your needs

Regular updates and support
